name: Onboarding Welcome
label: onboarding
content:
Welcome, <%= recipient.firstName %>!

Welcome, <%= recipient.firstName %>!

We're glad you're here. <% if (recipient.gender == 1) { %>Welcome, sir!<% } else { %>Welcome aboard!<% } %> Let's get you started.

Start Exploring

How It Works

1
 Complete your profile for tailored content.
2
 Check out our top-rated products.
3
 Set your notification preferences.

name: Limited Offer
label: promo
content:
Exclusive deal for you, <%= recipient.firstName %>

Hi <%= recipient.firstName %>, <% if (recipient.segment == "VIP") { %>as a VIP member, you get 40% off<% } else { %>enjoy 25% off<% } %> select items. Offer valid until <%= formatDate(Now + 7*24*60*60, "%d %B %Y") %>.
